titleStmt.title: SII 38.208: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 208. (A.R. No. 208 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the north wall, first prākāra, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Kampaṇṇa Uḍaiyār Year: Śaka 1290, Kīlaka, Kumbha, su. di. 14 wrong for śu. di. 4, Sunday, Asvati = 1369 A.D. February 11. err. śu. di. 14 for śu. di. 4.

summary.p: Incomplete. Records that the order of precedance in service to be followed by two types of dancing girls, ishabattaḷiyilār and dēvaraḍiyār as settled in the fifth regnal year of Rājanārāyaṇa Sambhuvarayār by the Mudaliyār of Mēlai-maḍam in Perumbaṟṟappuḷiyūr, having been found disregarded, an official, Kāmarasa-viṭṭappar of Āṉaikundi met (at the hall called) Vyākarṇadāṉa-tirukkāvaṇam and enquired of Vīrasōḻa-aṇukkar and kaikkōḷar, (who were probably connected with the temple administration) and Śrī Rudra-māhēśvara and effected necessary regulations.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . śakābdam Āyirattu Irunūṟṟu toṇṇūṟṟiṉ mel Uṭaiyar kampaṇauṭaiyaṟku cellā niṉṟa
kilakavaṛṣam kumbhanāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu catuṟdaśiyum nāyaṟṟukiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Aśvatināḷ patiyilār Iṣapattaḷiyilār tevaraṭiyār muṟaimaikkāriyattukku muṉpe kalaiyiṉ Irācanārāyaṇa campuvarāyaṟku Añcā
vatu perumpaṟṟappuliyūr melaimaṭattumutaliyār keṭṭu niṟutti veṭṭiṉa kalveṭṭum poruntāmal piṉpu tāṉattār cattiyapayiṟcil poruntāmal kalaintukiṭakkaiyil Āṉaikuntik kāmaracaviṭṭappar
Atikāri Āka vantu Iruntu Ivarkaḷ ceviyāmal Irukkaikku kāraṇam Eṉneṉṟu keṭṭu viracoḻaṇukkaraiyum kaikkoḷaraiyum Aḻaittu maṟiyikkaiyil Inta Iraṇṭucārārum porunta viyākaraṇatāṉa
ṉ tirukkāvaṇattu śrīrudraśrīmāheśvararum Āṉaikunti viṭṭapparum Iṣapattaḷiyilārkkum tevaraṭiyārkkum muṟaimai niṟcayitta
Digital edition of SII 38.208 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
